scored_niches.notes: 26.3M FIRE/finance community. Massive underserved market for daily financial education habit with streak/XP.
24.2M personal finance community. ZERO apps gamify daily investing/saving habits with streak mechanics. Enormous opportunity.
23.1M frugal/budgeting community. All apps are utility trackers. No app gamifies the daily habit of reviewing budget with streak/XP mechanics.
5.1M writing/journaling community. Day One and 750 Words have light streaks but neither is pure habit-gamification. Gap exists for serious daily writing streak with XP/levels.
2.7M guitarists. All apps are lesson platforms or tuners. Zero dedicated daily-practice streak apps with habit accountability.
2.2M social skills/EQ community. No apps gamify daily empathy/active-listening habit. Novel niche with rising demand.
2.2M debate/rhetoric community. Nearly zero dedicated apps. Strong intellectual habit niche.
2M professional networking community. LinkedIn is a platform not a habit app. Zero apps gamify the daily networking outreach habit with streaks.
1.8M piano learners. All apps are lesson platforms or performance tools. No daily practice streak tracker.
1.7M public speaking/communication community. All apps are coaching or content. No daily practice streak gamification.
1.5M vocal/singing community. Apps focus on karaoke or technical pitch. No daily vocal practice streak habit tracker.
617K ukulele learners. No dedicated daily practice streak app. Lightweight opportunity.
